name: CLKOUTV_f
description: Event output port - sends events from a SuperBlock to the parent diagram
xmlExample: <EventOutBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="CLKOUTV_f" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="output" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CLKOUTV_f"><ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value="1"/></ScilabString><ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="1"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/><mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="20.0" height="20.0"/></EventOutBlock>
criticalRules: Ordering must match the port number in the parent block
commonUses: Exporting clock/event signals from a SuperBlock
